---
title: "Finn Ericson"
subtitle: "Undergraduate"
image: /images/portraits/finn-ericson.jpeg
role: undergrad
weight: 10
aliases: ["Finn Ericson"]
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:fce7@cornell.edu"
---

Undergraduate researcher majoring in Environment & Sustainability.
